ckan_package.name: ess-dive-2319247-yakama-river-game-camera-stream-inundation
ckan_package.title: Timeseries Unlabeled and Labeled Photos, Modeled Water Surface Fractions, and Metadata of Variably Inundated Streams Across the Yakima River Basin
ckan_package.notes: ESS-DIVE dataset supporting a paper on monitoring river flow status using low-cost wildlife cameras and image segmentation AI. This package is useful for testing CKAN registration from a dataset that combines unstructured image collections, labeled image training data, CSV model outputs, file-level metadata, and manuscript-associated documentation.

extras.value: Monitoring river flow status using low-cost wildlife camera and image segmentation artificial intelligence
Representative direct file URLs are selected from the public ESS-DIVE Tier 2 directory listing; the full image tree is intentionally not enumerated.

resources.name: Water surface fractions README
resources.description: Plain-text readme describing the modeled water surface fraction CSV outputs.

resources.name: S30R Mask2Former water surface fractions
resources.description: CSV output containing modeled water surface fractions for site S30R using the Mask2Former workflow.

resources.name: S30R YOLO water surface fractions
resources.description: CSV output containing modeled water surface fractions for site S30R using the YOLO workflow.

resources.name: Label data README
resources.description: Plain-text readme for the labeled wildlife camera image data used for model training and evaluation.

resources.name: File-level metadata table
resources.description: ESS-DIVE file-level metadata table for the game camera manuscript data package.

ckan_package.name: ess-dive-3013287-warming-snow-loss-groundwater-colorado-headwater
ckan_package.title: Data From: Warming and Snow Loss Increase Reliance on Old Groundwater in a Colorado River Headwater
ckan_package.notes: ESS-DIVE data and code archive associated with a Nature Geoscience paper on warming, snow loss, and groundwater contributions in a Colorado River headwater. This package is useful for testing CKAN records with nested scientific code directories, model-input folders, notebook resources, geospatial/snow data processing scripts, observational CSVs, Excel sheets, and license/readme files.

extras.value: Warming and snow loss increase reliance on old groundwater in a Colorado River headwater

resources.name: Repository README
resources.description: Markdown readme describing the data and code archive, directory structure, manuscript reference, and usage notes.

resources.name: License file
resources.description: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 license text for the data and code archive.

resources.name: ASO comparison worksheet
resources.description: Excel workbook used for Airborne Snow Observatory comparison calculations for supplementary figures.

resources.name: ASO plot and comparison script
resources.description: Python script used to visualize and analyze regridded Airborne Snow Observatory data.

resources.name: Watershed elevation notebook
resources.description: Jupyter notebook used to determine outlet elevations for watersheds from Jasechko et al. inputs.

resources.name: Watershed altitude table
resources.description: CSV table of watershed outlet elevation information used in the associated manuscript analysis.

ckan_package.name: ess-dive-2575224-port-arthur-aerial-processed-model-data-2025
ckan_package.title: Aerial and Processed Model Data from Port Arthur, May 2025
ckan_package.notes: ESS-DIVE SETx-UIFL dataset containing aerial imagery and processed model data from Port Arthur, Texas. It is useful for testing CKAN registration of high-volume unstructured drone imagery, processed model folders, video resources, geospatial field-data provenance, and links to disaster-debris and aerial photogrammetry publications.

extras.value: A framework to enhance disaster debris estimation with AI and aerial photogrammetry
International Journal of Disaster Risk Reduction
The dataset is listed in SETx-UIFL code and datasets; the associated paper is methodologically related to AI and aerial photogrammetry debris estimation.

resources.name: ESS-DIVE content list
resources.description: Plain-text dataset-level content list with citation, DOI, and Tier 2 directory contents.

resources.name: Manifest with MD5 checksums
resources.description: Plain-text manifest listing data files and MD5 checksums for integrity validation.

resources.name: Project flyover video
resources.description: MP4 flyover video from the Port Arthur aerial survey and model documentation package.

ckan_package.name: ess-dive-2447557-port-arthur-rtk-drone-data-2024
ckan_package.title: Real-Time Kinematic Drone-Collected Data and Processed Models of Port Arthur Coastal Neighborhood and Pleasure Island Golf Course, June 2024
ckan_package.notes: ESS-DIVE SETx-UIFL dataset containing RTK drone-captured data and processed model assets for Port Arthur, Texas and Pleasure Island Golf Course. This package is useful for testing CKAN registration of nested drone-photo directories, multispectral TIFF imagery, raw GNSS/PPK files, image metadata, and geospatial field campaign data.

extras.value: A framework to enhance disaster debris estimation with AI and aerial photogrammetry
International Journal of Disaster Risk Reduction
The paper URL is methodologically associated with aerial photogrammetry and AI debris-estimation workflows; this dataset provides related SETx-UIFL RTK drone source data.

resources.name: Port Arthur PPK observation file sample
resources.description: GNSS/PPK observation file associated with the RTK drone flight image set.

resources.name: Port Arthur timestamp file sample
resources.description: DJI timestamp MRK file associated with the RTK drone flight image set.

ckan_package.name: ess-dive-3000569-crocus-forward-scatter-disdrometer-argonne-prairie
ckan_package.title: CROCUS Forward Scatter Disdrometer Data at Argonne National Laboratory Prairie Site
ckan_package.notes: ESS-DIVE CROCUS UIFL dataset containing time-indexed atmospheric disdrometer NetCDF files from the Argonne National Laboratory Prairie Site. This package is useful for testing CKAN registration of large collections of daily NetCDF resources, atmospheric instrument metadata, urban field laboratory project metadata, and file manifests.

extras.value: The Community Research on Climate and Urban Science Urban Integrated Field Laboratory
Bulletin of the American Meteorological Society
This is an instrument data product from the CROCUS Urban Integrated Field Laboratory; use it to test instrument time-series metadata and NetCDF resources.
